summary: Backend-only testing for VetCare Pro TanStack Start migration iteration 1. Verified FastAPI proxy (8001) -> TanStack Start (3000) forwarding, public endpoints, Clerk-gated 401 responses, 404 routing, external preview parity, and landing HTML. 20/20 pytest tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager (non-blocking nit).
Proxy correctly strips hop-by-hop headers and forwards Authorization/body/query — clean implementation.
Frontend .env has placeholder Clerk keys by design; document that swapping these requires `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend` (already noted in test_credentials.md).
test_credentials: None used. Clerk keys are placeholders by design; auth-gated endpoints expected to return 401. Per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: None created. Existing Prisma seed (8 species) verified via /api/species.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Once real Clerk keys are supplied in /app/frontend/.env and frontend is restarted, expand tests with a Clerk-authenticated client to cover: GET /api/users/me happy path, POST /api/users/me/register-pet-owner, GET /api/pets (empty + after create), GET /api/pets/$petId (200 for valid id, 400 for non-numeric, 404 for unknown), GET /api/visits. The proxy is verified to forward Authorization headers correctly, so real Clerk JWTs should reach clerk-server verifier cleanly. Internal endpoints: http://127.0.0.1:8001 (proxy) and http://127.0.0.1:3000 (direct). Preview: https://pnpm-to-bun.preview.emergentagent.com.

test_results_detail.service_health: PASS - supervisor: backend RUNNING, frontend RUNNING
test_results_detail.proxy_forwarding: PASS - GET /api/health via 8001 and 3000 both return {status:'ok', service:'vetcare-frontend', time:...}
test_results_detail.species_endpoint: PASS - 8 species returned via proxy and direct: Dog, Cat, Rabbit, Bird, Hamster, Fish, Reptile, Other
test_results_detail.auth_protected_fake_bearer: PASS - same endpoints with Bearer fakeToken_invalid_123 still return 401 (no 500). Confirms Authorization header is forwarded and Clerk verifier rejects.
test_results_detail.pet_detail_invalid_id: PASS - GET /api/pets/abc without auth returns 401 (401 precedes 400 check, as expected)
test_results_detail.preview_parity: PASS - /api/health, /api/species, /api/users/me all match internal behaviour via https://pnpm-to-bun.preview.emergentagent.com
test_results_detail.landing_page: PASS - HTML contains <title>VetCare Pro</title> and data-testid='landing-page' plus expected nav testids (nav-sign-in, btn-get-started, etc.)
